PinataWinsPayoutAndRulesShared.BodySymbolFeature1: During any spin, some symbols (excluding Wild symbol and Scatter symbol) in reels 2, 3 and/or 4 may appear with a gold frame.
PinataWinsPayoutAndRulesShared.BodySymbolFeature2: At every new round after the new symbols have cascaded down, any gold framed symbol that was involved in a win in the previous round will be transformed into Wild symbol(s).
PinataWinsPayoutAndRulesShared.BodySymbolMultiplierFeature1: During any spin, 1 or more gold framed symbols with multiplier values ranged between x2 to x100 may appear on the reels.
PinataWinsPayoutAndRulesShared.BodySymbolMultiplierFeature2: At every new round after the new symbols have cascaded down, multiplier(s) will be collected from any gold framed symbol with multiplier that was involved in a win in the previous round.
PinataWinsPayoutAndRulesShared.BodySymbolMultiplierFeature3: At the end of every spin, the total win of that spin will be multiplied by the total win multiplier collected.
PinataWinsPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature1: 3 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 15 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
PinataWinsPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature2: Any multipliers collected during any free spin will be added and will remain at the top of the reels until the end of the Free Spins Feature.
PinataWinsPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature3: At the end of every free spin, if there are 1 or more multiplier values collected during the free spin, the total win of that spin will be multiplied by the total win multiplier collected.
PinataWinsPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyMaximumWin1: The maximum win amount is %{5000}x of the bet amount.
PinataWinsPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyMaximumWin2: If the total win in the main game or the Free Spins Feature reaches %{5000}x of the bet amount, the spin ends.
PinataWinsPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyWinningBetLines1: Only the highest win per bet line is paid.
PinataWinsPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyWinningBetLines2: Bet lines win if the winning symbols are in succession from the leftmost reel to the right.
PinataWinsPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyWinningBetLines3: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode, allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
PinataWinsPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyWinningBetLines4: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
PinataWinsPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue1: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
PinataWinsPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue2: Gold Framed symbol appears on reels 2, 3 and 4 only.

PinataWinsRules.GeneralRules1: Pinata Wins is a 5-reel, 3-row video slot featuring Gold Framed symbols with Multipliers up to x100.

GeneralRules2.value: The game is played with 20 bet lines (fixed), bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
GeneralRules2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be minimum bet level, maximum max level, minimum bet size and maximum bet size in numeric form.
GeneralRules2.example: The game is played with 20 bet lines (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.5 to 50.

PinataWinsRules.GeneralRules3: Simultaneous wins on different bet lines are added.
PinataWinsRules.GeneralRules4: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
